eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Pueblo; Custer, CO; at 2:16 AM on JUN 1, 2026 Effective until 2:31 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: PUEBLO COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE: All residents in the 100 block of N Sigler Ave are asked to shelter in place. Stay inside, lock doors and windows. Update to follow.
